response.justification: Candidate is an experienced senior full-stack engineer with strong testing/craftsmanship background, but the resume shows minimal alignment with the core requirements of this role: deep JVM expertise, Java/Kotlin mastery, Spring ecosystem experience, and IDE internals work. Primary stacks are TypeScript/Node.js and DLang, with Java listed only as a skill and briefly used for robotic arms and a device orchestration tool years ago. No Kotlin, no Spring, no demonstrated IDE/language-tooling work beyond a short C/C++ stint on LabWindows/CVI a decade ago.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based development)
Proven experience on complex, large-scale, low-latency systems at Sociomantic
Brief but relevant IDE-adjacent experience at National Instruments (LabWindows/CVI)
concerns: No demonstrated Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate experience
Java usage is shallow and dated; Kotlin not mentioned at all
No evidence of IDE internals, language tooling, or JVM-deep work

key_factors.factor: No Kotlin and only superficial Java experience
Strong general engineering and craftsmanship track record
